nasb.text: the twelve gold pans, full of incense, weighing ten shekels apiece, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, all the gold of the pans 120 shekels;

esv.text: the twelve golden dishes, full of incense, weighing 10 shekels apiece according to the shekel of the sanctuary, all the gold of the dishes being 120 shekels;

cnv.text: 金盂十二個，盛滿了香，按聖所的秤，每個金盂重一百一十克；這些金盂的金子，共有一公斤零三百二十克；

ccb.text: 以圣所的秤为准，盛满香的十二个金碟子每个重一百一十克，共重一点三二公斤；
